text.autoconfig.rebrand.title: Rebrand Configuration
text.autoconfig.rebrand.option.globalEna: Toggles Rebrand features globally. If disabled, all branding falls back to vanilla behavior.
text.autoconfig.rebrand.option.globalBra: The name to display globally across Rebrand features, unless overridden.
text.autoconfig.rebrand.option.globalVer: The version string to display globally across Rebrand features, unless overridden.
text.autoconfig.rebrand.option.networkin: Enable sending a custom brand to the server during connection.
Custom brand name to send instead of the default (usually 'vanilla').
Disables mod loader brand detection. May cause incompatibility with modded servers.
text.autoconfig.rebrand.option.windowTit: Enable customization of the main window title bar.
Custom name to show in the window title bar instead of the global brand name.
Display the Minecraft version in the window title bar.
Custom version string to show in the window title bar instead of the global version.
Whether to show 'Modded' in the window title if the client is modded.
Display current multiplayer server address in the title bar.
text.autoconfig.rebrand.option.titleScre: Enable customization of the branding shown on the title screen.
Show the client brand name on the title screen splash.
Custom name to display on the title screen instead of the global brand name.
Display the version string on the title screen splash.
Custom version string to show on the title screen splash instead of the global version.
Display 'Modded' on the title screen when applicable.
Makes the title screen extra fabulous. Very slay.
